requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — MSTRD Conformity and IEC 62109 Applicability
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——MSTRD合规与IEC 62109适用性
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——MSTRD合規與IEC 62109適用性

summary.en: Myanmar's product safety framework for electrical equipment is administered by MSTRD (Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division) under the Ministry of Science and Technology. Myanmar standards are largely voluntary and follow IEC/ISO methodology. No mandatory product safety certification mark equivalent to CE marking has been identified for PV inverters in publicly available MSTRD publications as of the access date. Where MSTRD standards exist for a product category, conformity documentation may be requested as part of MIC import-permit review or customs clearance for regulated categories. IEC 62109-1 (general safety requirements for power converters used in PV systems) and IEC 62109-2 (particular requirements for inverters) are the applicable IEC safety standards for PV inverters; MSTRD conformity review for PV inverters in scope would reference these IEC standards. Some regulated product categories in Myanmar require a conformity certificate from MSTRD or an accredited body — verify whether PV inverters fall within the current regulated catalogue with MSTRD before import.
summary.zh: 缅甸电气设备产品安全框架由科技部下属的MSTRD（标准与检测研究司）管理。缅甸标准大多为自愿性质，遵循IEC/ISO方法论。截至查询日期，在MSTRD公开发布文件中尚未发现针对光伏逆变器的与CE标志等同的强制性产品安全认证标志。对于存在MSTRD标准的产品类别，合规文件可能在MIC进口许可审查或受监管类别通关时被要求提供。IEC 62109-1（光伏系统用功率变换器通用安全要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆变器专用要求）是光伏逆变器适用的IEC安全标准；在范围内的光伏逆变器MSTRD合规审查将参考这些IEC标准。缅甸部分受监管产品类别要求提供MSTRD或认可机构的合规证书——进口前请向MSTRD核实光伏逆变器是否列入当前受监管目录。
summary.zht: 緬甸電氣設備產品安全框架由科技部下屬的MSTRD（標準與檢測研究司）管理。緬甸標準大多為自願性質，遵循IEC/ISO方法論。截至查詢日期，在MSTRD公開發布文件中尚未發現針對光伏逆變器的與CE標誌等同的強制性產品安全認證標誌。對於存在MSTRD標準的產品類別，合規文件可能在MIC進口許可審查或受監管類別清關時被要求提供。IEC 62109-1（光伏系統用功率變換器通用安全要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆變器專用要求）是光伏逆變器適用的IEC安全標準；在範圍內的光伏逆變器MSTRD合規審查將參考這些IEC標準。緬甸部分受監管產品類別要求提供MSTRD或認可機構的合規證書——進口前請向MSTRD核實光伏逆變器是否列入當前受監管目錄。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Standards Law (if enacted and in force — verify current status with MSTRD)
IEC 62109-1:2010 — Safety of power converters for use in PV power systems: General requirements (IEC reference applied by MSTRD for PV inverter safety)
IEC 62109-2:2011 — Safety of power converters for use in PV power systems: Particular requirements for inverters
MSTRD voluntary standards catalogue (verify current scope for PV inverters)

summary.en: China's PV inverter safety certification landscape is voluntary at the product level. CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) and CGC (China General Certification / 鉴衡认证) offer voluntary safety certifications referencing IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 via the IECEE CB Scheme or direct product certification. GB/T 37408-2019 (recommended national standard) incorporates safety requirements for PV grid-connected inverters. Grid-tied PV inverters are not listed in the CCC mandatory catalogue as of 2026. Chinese manufacturers supplying to Myanmar can leverage existing IEC 62109-1/-2 CB test certificates (obtainable through CQC as an IECEE NCB) as the primary safety evidence for MSTRD or MIC documentation requests, given Myanmar's IEC-aligned voluntary standard framework.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器在产品层面的安全认证属自愿性质。CQC（中国质量认证中心）和CGC（鉴衡认证）通过IECEE CB体系或直接产品认证，提供引用IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2的自愿性安全认证。GB/T 37408-2019（推荐性国家标准）纳入了并网光伏逆变器的安全要求。截至2026年，并网光伏逆变器未列入CCC强制认证目录。向缅甸供货的中国制造商，鉴于缅甸采用IEC对齐的自愿性标准框架，可利用现有IEC 62109-1/-2 CB测试证书（可通过作为IECEE NCB的CQC获取）作为应对MSTRD或MIC文件要求的主要安全证明。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器在產品層面的安全認證屬自願性質。CQC（中國質量認證中心）和CGC（鑒衡認證）通過IECEE CB體系或直接產品認證，提供引用IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2的自願性安全認證。GB/T 37408-2019（推薦性國家標準）納入了並網光伏逆變器的安全要求。截至2026年，並網光伏逆變器未列入CCC強制認證目錄。向緬甸供貨的中國製造商，鑒於緬甸採用IEC對齊的自願性標準框架，可利用現有IEC 62109-1/-2 CB測試證書（可通過作為IECEE NCB的CQC獲取）作為應對MSTRD或MIC文件要求的主要安全證明。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — Technical requirements for PV grid-connected inverters, incl. safety (recommended)
IEC 62109-1:2010 / IEC 62109-2:2011 — obtainable via IECEE CB Scheme through CQC (IECEE NCB for China)
CGC voluntary PV inverter certification (references IEC 62109-1/-2)

gap.en: The gap is one of verification rather than technical content: Myanmar does not impose a mandatory CE-equivalent safety certification mark, so there is no statutory product safety pre-market approval step equivalent to LVD CE marking. However, MSTRD may list PV inverters in a regulated category requiring conformity documentation — the exporter must verify the current MSTRD regulated catalogue before each shipment, as the list can be updated. If MSTRD conformity documentation is required, IEC 62109-1/-2 CB test certificates from CQC (as an IECEE NCB) are the appropriate evidence, as Myanmar's voluntary standards follow IEC methodology. Chinese manufacturers holding existing IEC 62109 CB certificates face minimal technical gap; the administrative gap is confirming Myanmar's current regulatory status for this product category.
gap.zh: 差距在于核实层面而非技术内容：缅甸没有强制性的CE等效安全认证标志，因此不存在与LVD CE标志等同的法定产品安全上市前审批步骤。但MSTRD可能将光伏逆变器列入需要合规文件的受监管类别——出口商须在每次出货前核实当前MSTRD受监管目录，因为该目录可能更新。如需MSTRD合规文件，来自CQC（作为IECEE NCB）的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB测试证书是适当的证明，因为缅甸自愿性标准遵循IEC方法论。持有现有IEC 62109 CB证书的中国制造商技术差距极小；行政差距在于确认该产品类别的缅甸当前监管状态。
gap.zht: 差距在於核實層面而非技術內容：緬甸沒有強制性的CE等效安全認證標誌，因此不存在與LVD CE標誌等同的法定產品安全上市前審批步驟。但MSTRD可能將光伏逆變器列入需要合規文件的受監管類別——出口商須在每次出貨前核實當前MSTRD受監管目錄，因為該目錄可能更新。如需MSTRD合規文件，來自CQC（作為IECEE NCB）的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB測試證書是適當的證明，因為緬甸自願性標準遵循IEC方法論。持有現有IEC 62109 CB證書的中國製造商技術差距極小；行政差距在於確認該產品類別的緬甸當前監管狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Largely voluntary — no mandatory product safety certification mark confirmed for PV inverters in Myanmar as of access date. Verify MSTRD regulated catalogue before import; some categories require conformity documentation.
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary (GB/T 37408-2019, CQC, CGC). CCC mandatory catalogue does not list grid-tied PV inverters as of 2026.

source.publisher: MSTRD — Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division, Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar imposes no mandatory CE-equivalent safety certification mark on PV inverters as of the access date. Verify the current MSTRD regulated catalogue before shipment. IEC 62109-1/-2 CB test certificates (from CQC or other IECEE NCB) are the appropriate safety evidence if MSTRD conformity documentation is requested. This comparison is informational only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至查询日期，缅甸对光伏逆变器没有强制性CE等效安全认证标志要求。出货前请核实当前MSTRD受监管目录。如被要求提供MSTRD合规文件，IEC 62109-1/-2 CB测试证书（来自CQC或其他IECEE NCB）是适当的安全证明。本比较仅供参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至查詢日期，緬甸對光伏逆變器沒有強制性CE等效安全認證標誌要求。出貨前請核實當前MSTRD受監管目錄。如被要求提供MSTRD合規文件，IEC 62109-1/-2 CB測試證書（來自CQC或其他IECEE NCB）是適當的安全證明。本比較僅供參考。

requirement_topic.en: Installation Safety and Labelling — Myanmar Electrical Rules and Site Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 安装安全与标识——缅甸电气规则及现场要求
requirement_topic.zht: 安裝安全與標識——緬甸電氣規則及現場要求

summary.en: Myanmar's electrical installation rules are administered by MOEE and enforced through MEPE/ESE distribution licence conditions. The applicable installation code framework is evolving; Myanmar historically referenced IEC 60364 series (low-voltage electrical installations) and local building codes for electrical installation safety. PV inverter labelling and installation documentation requirements at the site level include: product nameplate in English (or Myanmar language where required by local authority), safety warnings, rated voltage and frequency matching the installation site (230 V / 50 Hz), and installation and operation manual. No Myanmar-specific mandatory inverter installation certification equivalent to national type-testing has been confirmed. MEPE site inspection reviews inverter nameplate, installation quality, and operating parameters as part of the NEM grid-connection approval process.
summary.zh: 缅甸电气安装规则由MOEE管理，通过MEPE/ESE配电许可条件执行。适用的安装规范框架仍在演变；缅甸历史上参考IEC 60364系列（低压电气装置）和当地建筑规范作为电气安装安全依据。现场层面的光伏逆变器标识和安装文件要求包括：英文（或当地主管部门要求的缅甸语）产品铭牌、安全警告、与安装场地匹配的额定电压和频率（230 V/50 Hz），以及安装和操作手册。尚未确认缅甸有等同于国家型式试验的强制性逆变器安装认证要求。MEPE现场检查在NEM并网审批过程中审查逆变器铭牌、安装质量和运行参数。
summary.zht: 緬甸電氣安裝規則由MOEE管理，通過MEPE/ESE配電許可條件執行。適用的安裝規範框架仍在演變；緬甸歷史上參考IEC 60364系列（低壓電氣裝置）和當地建築規範作為電氣安裝安全依據。現場層面的光伏逆變器標識和安裝文件要求包括：英文（或當地主管部門要求的緬甸語）產品銘牌、安全警告、與安裝場地匹配的額定電壓和頻率（230 V/50 Hz），以及安裝和操作手冊。尚未確認緬甸有等同於國家型式試驗的強制性逆變器安裝認證要求。MEPE現場檢查在NEM並網審批過程中審查逆變器銘牌、安裝質量和運行參數。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364 series — Low-voltage electrical installations (referenced in Myanmar electrical installation practice)
MEPE/ESE site inspection requirements for NEM grid-connection approval (project-level, procedural)

summary.en: China's PV inverter installation safety and labelling requirements are primarily set by GB/T 37408-2019 (labelling, marking, documentation requirements for grid-connected PV inverters) and GB 5585-series (wiring accessories safety). Inverter nameplates in China must display rated input voltage, rated output voltage (220 V AC, 50 Hz for single-phase domestic; 380 V AC, 50 Hz three-phase), rated power, efficiency class, and manufacturer details per GB/T 37408-2019 and CQC/CGC certification scheme requirements. Chinese manufacturers supplying Myanmar should produce additional or modified English-language nameplates showing 230 V / 50 Hz output compatibility, since Myanmar site inspectors will check nameplate ratings against the local grid parameters.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安装安全与标识要求主要由GB/T 37408-2019（并网光伏逆变器标识、标注及文件要求）和GB 5585系列（布线附件安全）规定。依据GB/T 37408-2019和CQC/CGC认证方案要求，中国逆变器铭牌须标注额定输入电压、额定输出电压（单相家用220 V交流/50 Hz；三相380 V交流/50 Hz）、额定功率、效率等级及制造商信息。向缅甸供货的中国制造商应另行制作或修改英文铭牌，标注230 V/50 Hz输出兼容性，因为缅甸现场检查人员将对照当地电网参数核查铭牌额定值。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安裝安全與標識要求主要由GB/T 37408-2019（並網光伏逆變器標識、標注及文件要求）和GB 5585系列（布線附件安全）規定。依據GB/T 37408-2019和CQC/CGC認證方案要求，中國逆變器銘牌須標注額定輸入電壓、額定輸出電壓（單相家用220 V交流/50 Hz；三相380 V交流/50 Hz）、額定功率、效率等級及製造商信息。向緬甸供貨的中國製造商應另行製作或修改英文銘牌，標注230 V/50 Hz輸出兼容性，因為緬甸現場檢查人員將對照當地電網參數核查銘牌額定值。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — Technical requirements for PV grid-connected inverters, incl. labelling and documentation requirements (recommended)
CGC/CQC certification scheme nameplate and documentation requirements

gap.en: Two practical gaps exist: (1) Nameplate voltage mismatch — inverters labelled for 220 V AC output may fail MEPE site inspection if the nameplate does not indicate compatibility with 230 V / 50 Hz operation. Chinese manufacturers should either: supply inverters with a configurable or wide-range AC output (e.g. 180–270 V) and document this on the English nameplate, or produce a 230 V-specific firmware/hardware variant. (2) Language — installation manuals in Chinese only are unlikely to satisfy Myanmar site installation and MEPE inspection requirements. English installation documentation is the practical minimum; Myanmar-language documentation may be required by some local authorities. These are administrative and product-configuration gaps, not fundamental technical certification gaps.
gap.zh: 存在两个实际差距：（1）铭牌电压不匹配——标注220 V交流输出的逆变器，若铭牌未注明与230 V/50 Hz运行的兼容性，可能无法通过MEPE现场检查。中国制造商应选择以下方案之一：提供带可配置或宽范围交流输出（如180–270 V）的逆变器，并在英文铭牌上记录此信息；或生产230 V专用固件/硬件变体。（2）语言——仅有中文的安装手册可能无法满足缅甸现场安装和MEPE检查要求。英文安装文件是实际最低要求；部分地方主管部门可能要求缅甸语文件。这些属于行政和产品配置差距，而非根本性的技术认证差距。
gap.zht: 存在兩個實際差距：（1）銘牌電壓不匹配——標注220 V交流輸出的逆變器，若銘牌未注明與230 V/50 Hz運行的兼容性，可能無法通過MEPE現場檢查。中國製造商應選擇以下方案之一：提供帶可配置或寬範圍交流輸出（如180–270 V）的逆變器，並在英文銘牌上記錄此信息；或生產230 V專用固件/硬件變體。（2）語言——僅有中文的安裝手冊可能無法滿足緬甸現場安裝和MEPE檢查要求。英文安裝文件是實際最低要求；部分地方主管部門可能要求緬甸語文件。這些屬於行政和產品配置差距，而非根本性的技術認證差距。

mandatory_status.target: Procedurally required for MEPE NEM site approval — nameplate and installation documentation reviewed at site inspection. No confirmed mandatory national installation certification scheme for PV inverters.
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T 37408-2019 labelling). CQC/CGC certification documentation requirements apply for voluntary certification schemes.

source.publisher: Ministry of Electricity and Energy (MOEE) / MEPE, Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The two practical action items for Chinese PV inverter exporters are: (1) confirm and document 230 V / 50 Hz nameplate compatibility on English-language labels; (2) provide English installation and operation manuals. IEC 60364-aligned installation practice is expected by MEPE site inspectors. No mandatory national type-certification for installation safety has been confirmed. This comparison is informational only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国光伏逆变器出口商的两项实际行动：（1）在英文标签上确认并记录230 V/50 Hz铭牌兼容性；（2）提供英文安装和操作手册。MEPE现场检查员预期遵循IEC 60364对齐的安装规范。尚未确认针对安装安全的强制性国家型式认证要求。本比较仅供参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國光伏逆變器出口商的兩項實際行動：（1）在英文標籤上確認並記錄230 V/50 Hz銘牌兼容性；（2）提供英文安裝和操作手冊。MEPE現場檢查員預期遵循IEC 60364對齊的安裝規範。尚未確認針對安裝安全的強制性國家型式認證要求。本比較僅供參考。
